nasb.text: The length of the porch was twenty cubits and the width eleven cubits; and at the stairway by which it was ascended were columns belonging to the side pillars, one on each side.

esv.text: The length of the vestibule was twenty cubits, and the breadth twelve cubits, and people would go up to it by ten steps. And there were pillars beside the jambs, one on either side.

cnv.text: 門廊寬十公尺，深六公尺；人要登臺階才上到門廊；牆柱旁邊有柱子，這邊一根，那邊一根。

ccb.text: 门廊长十米，宽四点九米。上门廊靠近墙柱的石级两旁各有一根柱子。
